text:
🌟 LAND OF THE EWOKS: BOSTON EDITION 🌟

My mom wanted a lobster roll 🦞 and somehow I ended up on a road trip to Boston. Typical 🙄

Attention Boston! The Ewoks are coming. 

Well… technically they’re Shih Tzus, but let’s be honest—we all know they’re just Ewoks with better grooming appointments.

🐾 Join us for Land of the Ewoks: Boston Edition at Boston Common for an afternoon of fluff, chaos, tiny legs, questionable listening skills, and enough cuteness to shut down the city.

📅 Date: Sunday September 13, 2026
⏰ Time: 12pm 
📸 Group Shot: 1:30pm
📍 Boston Common, Boston, MA

Whether your Shih Tzu is a social butterfly, a professional lap sitter, or a tiny dictator who runs your household, they’re invited. 🥰

See you in the Land of the Ewoks, Boston. May the fluff be with you. 🐾

#shihtzumeetup #shihtzu #shihtzusofinstagram #shihtzugram
